name: Coca-Cola Cake (Tdn)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease and flour a 9 x 13 inch baking pan.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour and sugar; set aside.
4. In a small, heavy saucepan, bring the margarine, Coca-Cola, and cocoa to a boil. Pour over the flour and sugar mixture and mix thoroughly. Add buttermilk, eggs, baking soda, vanilla extract, and miniature marshmallows.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and bake for 35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. While the cake is baking, prepare Coca-Cola Frosting to frost the cake while it is still hot.
